block_00: Try the Moving Average in your strategy
block_01: This indicator consists of just one line, but it reveals so much useful information about the chart that both novice and experienced traders love using it. The Moving Average comes in four types: EMA, SMA, WMA and SSMA, allowing each trader to adjust the tool according to their preferences.
block_02: Using the MA indicator, traders can determine the direction of the trend and possible entry points for a deal. In this article, we explain why the Moving Average is worth your attention, how to set it up and how to interpret its signals.
block_03: Check the article to introduce this useful indicator to your trading system.
